title: Add a few debug messages to pull
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add a few debug statements to find out why a pull failed.  Also if we encounter a URL error, handle it rather than checking for the registry which will cause "invalid reference format" errors.

Testing: 
=====
```
# ./buildah from docker://registry1.fedoraproject.org/fedora-minimal
Get https://registry1.fedoraproject.org/v2/: dial tcp: lookup registry1.fedoraproject.org on 192.168.122.1:53: no such host
```

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit fd9184f has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan fd9184f170e2a19fdf4a8ac6bec667d864cf6745 -->

@rhatdan I added a url check to this, I like it better than #907
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 338b23e) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Needs a rebase, do we still want this?
@rhatdan we should do something here, I just haven't gotten back roundtoit.  Need to do so.
I'm going to close this rather than rebase as I think @nalind's #1072 addressed most if not all of this one.
